evals.name: s3-run-verify-only
evals.expected_output: Run route executes against an existing spec. forge-pool-run-spec.mjs is invoked with --spec but without --record or --record-as. Verification-only — exit 0 indicates spec passes. No new file appears in forge/videos/.
expectations: Lead loads references/run.md (visible in tool call log)
forge-pool-run-spec.mjs is invoked via Bash with --spec
The Bash invocation does NOT include --record or --record-as flags
After the run, no new .webm file with a recent modification time appears in forge/videos/
No Agent (subagent) calls are made — run route is team-less

evals.name: s3-run-with-label
evals.expected_output: Run route with explicit recording label. forge-pool-run-spec.mjs is invoked with --spec and --record-as smoke-s3. After the run, a video file lands at forge/videos/add-backpack-to-cart-standard-smoke-s3.webm.
expectations: Lead loads references/run.md
forge-pool-run-spec.mjs is invoked via Bash with --spec and --record-as smoke-s3
After the run, forge/videos/add-backpack-to-cart-standard-smoke-s3.webm exists
The video file is larger than 10000 bytes (not empty)
No Agent subagent calls are made

evals.name: s3-run-last-spec
evals.expected_output: Run route with 'last' shorthand. Lead resolves to the most recently modified spec in forge/specs/ and invokes the runner against it. No recording.
expectations: Lead loads references/run.md
Lead resolves 'last' to a specific spec name (lists forge/specs/ sorted by mtime)
forge-pool-run-spec.mjs is invoked via Bash with --spec pointing to the resolved file
The Bash invocation does NOT include --record or --record-as flags
Lead's final report names the resolved spec so the user can correct if needed

evals.name: s3-export-default
evals.expected_output: Export route invokes forge-export-spec.mjs against the named spec. Default output lands at <project-root>/forge-exports/<name>.spec.ts (outside the gitignored forge/ dir). Output is self-contained — no snippet imports.
expectations: Lead loads references/export.md
forge-export-spec.mjs is invoked via Bash with --spec and --output and --force flags
After the run, a file exists at <project-root>/forge-exports/add-backpack-to-cart-standard.spec.ts
The exported file contains zero occurrences of `from '../snippets/'`
The exported file imports only from '@playwright/test' (self-contained for shipping)

evals.name: s3-export-output-override
evals.expected_output: Export route with explicit --output override. Output lands at the user-specified path instead of the default forge-exports/ location.
expectations: Lead loads references/export.md
forge-export-spec.mjs is invoked via Bash with --output /tmp/forge-eval-export.spec.ts
After the run, a file exists at /tmp/forge-eval-export.spec.ts
The exported file contains zero `from '../snippets/'` imports
